name: Lady Bird Johnson's Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with coconut.
2. In a saucepan, combine corn syrup, brown sugar, and margarine.
3. Cook over medium heat until well blended.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
5. Blend in the flour mixture.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls about 3-4 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 325 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes.
